task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "读取输入的音频文件"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "使用noisereduce库对音频进行降噪处理"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "标准化音频音量（+5dB增益）"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "导出预处理后的音频文件为WAV格式"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "加载Whisper模型用于语音识别"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "将音频文件转录为带时间戳的文字内容"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "使用DistilBERT模型对文本进行情感分类"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "使用KeyBERT提取文本中的关键词"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "根据情感得分和关键词判断语音片段是否重要"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "保存结构化结果到JSON文件"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "打印标记的重要语音片段"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "生成多维度情感分析结果（强度、情绪分类、VADER分析）"}, {"id": "Node13", "description": "生成情感走势可视化图表"}, {"id": "Node14", "description": "生成层次化标题结构"}, {"id": "Node15", "description": "生成Markdown格式报告"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "preprocess"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "normalize"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "export"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "loadModel"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "transcribe"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node7", "type": "analyzeSentiment"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node8", "type": "extractKeywords"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node9", "type": "evaluateImportance"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node9", "type": "evaluateImportance"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node10", "type": "saveResults"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node11", "type": "printImportantSegments"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node12", "type": "detailedSentimentAnalysis"}, {"source": "Node12", "target": "Node13", "type": "generateVisualization"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node14", "type": "generateTitles"}, {"source": "Node14", "target": "Node15", "type": "generateReport"}]}
